Class CelebrationKind

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.util.ExtensibleEnum
org.episteme.social.sociology.CelebrationKind
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExtensibleEnum>
public final class CelebrationKind extends ExtensibleEnum
Categories of cultural or religious celebrations.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
